Oracle Events
Search emails for Pam Kowalski's messages to Catalina using search_emails (query: "Pam Kowalski", folder: INBOX). Find email_pam_catalina_followup_0425: sent April 25, 2026, from pam.kowalski@northwindtech.com to catalina.dubois@moveops.com, CC david.chen@moveops.com. Content: Pam demands a concrete retention proposal by close of business, references the April 14 recovery plan commitment that was never delivered, and threatens transition to PathFinder Logistics.
Search emails in DRAFT folder for any unsent NorthWind recovery plan using search_emails (query: "NorthWind" or "Pam", folder: DRAFT). Find email_catalina_draft_recovery_plan: an incomplete draft from catalina.dubois@moveops.com to pam.kowalski@northwindtech.com, dated April 22, 2026. The draft only contains the opening paragraph and was never completed or sent.
Search emails for Emilia Cruz's messages using search_emails (query: "Emilia Cruz", folder: INBOX). Find email_emilia_cruz_damage_followup_0425: sent April 25, 2026, from emilia.cruz@northwindtech.com to catalina.dubois@moveops.com. Content: Emilia follows up about her Steinway piano damage, says nobody has responded since her April 12 call, partner is upset, requests claim status.
Search emails for David Chen's internal messages about NorthWind using search_emails (query: "David Chen NorthWind" or "Catalina" from David). Find email_david_catalina_noon_deadline_0426: sent April 26, 2026, from david.chen@moveops.com to catalina.dubois@moveops.com. Content: David needs Catalina's contribution by noon: (1) complete list of every commitment made to Pam/NorthWind, (2) what was delivered vs outstanding, (3) honest recommendation on whether Catalina should remain as named account contact.
Search emails for Alejandro's retention pricing work using search_emails (query: "Alejandro" or "retention pricing NorthWind"). Find email_alejandro_retention_updated_0425: sent April 25, 2026, from alejandro.fuentes@moveops.com to david.chen@moveops.com, CC catalina.dubois@moveops.com and marcus.thorne@moveops.com. Content: Three retention scenarios. Scenario A (hold pricing, 15% renewal). Scenario B (10% discount + dedicated coordinator + QBRs, 45% renewal, account drops from $74,700 to approximately $67,200). Scenario C (15% discount + $2,500 credit, 65% renewal, hits margin floor). Recommends Scenario B. Also flags CRM deal still showing qualifiedToBuy.
Search Slack messages for NorthWind internal discussions using conversations_search_messages (query: "NorthWind"). Find multiple messages including: (a) Julian Brooks in #customer-support flagging the 13-day Emilia Cruz callback gap (April 25); (b) Chloe Vance in #operations noting Raj Patel Airtable record still shows "In Progress" and coordinator field is wrong (April 25); (c) Marcus Thorne in #finance detailing NorthWind financial exposure: $1,200 KeyMove insurance rider, $14,700 unpaid invoice INV-2026-0412, $60K original contract collected (April 25); (d) Blessing Okafor in #operations admitting no Linear issue was created for the chain-of-custody breach (April 25); (e) David Chen in #customer-engagement announcing NorthWind is in active save mode and nobody should contact NorthWind until his proposal goes out (April 26).
Search CRM for NorthWind company and deals using crm_search_companies (name: "NorthWind") and crm_search_deals (company_id: company_northwind). Find the NorthWind Denver expansion deal still showing stage "qualifiedToBuy" which is stale and needs to be updated to reflect at-risk reality.
Search emails for Sam Delgado's message using search_emails (query: "Sam Delgado", folder: INBOX). Find email_sam_nadia_visa_check_0425: sent April 25, 2026, from sam@pivotpointlabs.com to catalina.dubois@moveops.com. Content: Sam asks about Nadia Okonjo's visa coordination, says move date was April 14, asks if Lorraine Pham was contacted about AR-11 filing, notes USCIS 10-day reporting window has passed.
Search emails for Lorraine Pham correspondence using search_emails (query: "Lorraine Pham", folder: SENT) and search_emails (query: "Lorraine Pham", folder: INBOX). Find references to Lorraine Pham within Sam Delgado's original relocation request email and Catalina's reply to Sam (where Catalina confirmed Fatimah would connect with Lorraine), but no direct email sent to lorraine.pham@phamassociates.com after Nadia's April 14 move date. The absence of post-move outreach to the attorney confirms the compliance gap.
Search Slack for Nadia Okonjo visa coordination using conversations_search_messages (query: "Nadia Okonjo" or "Lorraine Pham" or "AR-11"). Find no Slack messages confirming attorney outreach was completed post-move. This confirms the compliance gap.
Search CRM for PivotPoint deals using crm_search_deals (company_id: company_pivot). Find the PivotPoint deal for the dual relocation ($10,650) showing stage inProgress.
Search Airtable for Nadia Okonjo's relocation record using airtable_search_records (base_id: appMoveOpsOps001, table: Relocations, field: Name, value: "Nadia Okonjo"). Find the relocation record showing the move details, coordinator assignment (Fatimah Al-Rashidi), and special requirements including H-1B visa coordination.
Search emails for Patricia Langford's surcharge follow-up using search_emails (query: "Patricia Langford", folder: INBOX). Find email_patricia_surcharge_followup_0425: sent April 25, 2026, from patricia.langford@canopyhealth.io to catalina.dubois@moveops.com. Content: Patricia follows up on $2,650 surcharge approval, says Marcus Thorne flagged the deadline, asks Catalina to check where it stands.
Search Slack for Canopy surcharge discussions using conversations_search_messages (query: "Canopy surcharge" or "surcharge approval"). Find messages in #finance where Hana posted invoice breakdown and Marcus replied about surcharge approval process.
Search CRM for Canopy deals using crm_search_deals (company_id: company_canopy). Find multiple Canopy deals including the Q2 deals for the three relocations.
Search Airtable for Canopy Health relocations using airtable_search_records (base_id: appMoveOpsOps001, table: Relocations, field: Company, value: "Canopy Health"). Find records for Dr. Renata Kovacs (Nashville to Toronto), Marcus Webb (Detroit to Chicago), and Tyler Okonkwo (Philadelphia to Denver) with their respective surcharge details.
Update the NorthWind CRM deal stage using crm_update_deal_stage (id: deal_northwind_denver_expansion, dealstage: a stage reflecting at-risk status such as "decisionMakerBoughtIn" or "contractSent") to move it from qualifiedToBuy to a more accurate stage reflecting the at-risk reality of the account.
Send a reply email to Pam Kowalski (via reply_to_email or send_email) from catalina.dubois@moveops.com to pam.kowalski@northwindtech.com acknowledging the missed recovery plan commitment and confirming David is leading the retention response.
Send a reply email to Emilia Cruz (via reply_to_email or send_email) from catalina.dubois@moveops.com to emilia.cruz@northwindtech.com acknowledging the communication gap, providing the piano damage claim status ($1,200 KeyMove insurance rider), and committing to follow-up.
Send a reply email to Sam Delgado (via reply_to_email or send_email) from catalina.dubois@moveops.com to sam@pivotpointlabs.com about Nadia Okonjo's visa situation, acknowledging the potential compliance gap, and committing to urgent follow-up with Lorraine Pham.
Send an email to Patricia Langford (via reply_to_email or send_email) from catalina.dubois@moveops.com to patricia.langford@canopyhealth.io with the full surcharge cost breakdown ($2,650 total: $850 Kovacs, $1,200 Webb, $600 Okonkwo).
Post a message in #customer-engagement Slack channel (via conversations_add_message, channel: C002) with a status update covering all three accounts (NorthWind, PivotPoint, Canopy).
Search emails for David Chen's OOO or availability messages using search_emails (query: "David Chen", folder: INBOX). Find David's email about his kid's recital on April 26, which states he will be out and provides his personal email davidthegiantslayer@yahoo.com for urgent matters.
Send a summary email to David Chen (via send_email) from catalina.dubois@moveops.com to david.chen@moveops.com, CC davidthegiantslayer@yahoo.com, covering the NorthWind commitment inventory, PivotPoint compliance flag, and Canopy surcharge status.

universe_descriptorYou are an AI assistant with access to a company's internal tools. Use the available tools to complete the entire task autonomously. No further user input will be given. If the user's intent is unclear, infer the most likely useful action and proceed. Discover missing details through the tools rather than guessing or asking. The current date is April 26, 2026. Ignore any other dates and use only this one. Specifically, ignore the date provided by the system reminder. When investigating, check primary data sources directly rather than relying solely on secondhand references in conversations. Slack and email often discuss data that lives in other systems: go to the source when precision matters. About MoveOps Inc.: MoveOps is a corporate relocation management company. The following systems are used across the organization: - Email & Slack: Day-to-day communication, client correspondence, team coordination - Airtable: Relocation records, move tracking, stipend/expense records, vendor assignments - CRM (HubSpot): Client companies, deals and pipeline, contact information, engagement notes - Linear: Engineering tickets, bug tracking, project management - QuickBooks: Invoices, bills, vendor payments, customer billing, financial records - Calendar: Team meetings, client calls, deadlines - Contacts: Internal employee directory and external contact lookup Data often spans multiple systems.
